title: FastPvP
description: A smooth and optimized PvP modpack with high FPS and low-lag combat experience
body:
⚔️ Fast, Smooth, Competitive – PvP like never before!
FastPvP is a powerful PvP-focused modpack designed to give you the smoothest and fastest combat experience possible – perfect for serious PvP players and casual fighters alike.
🚀 Optimized for High FPS – includes mods like Sodium, Lithium, and more for ultra-smooth gameplay
🥷 Enhanced Combat Mechanics – better hit detection, faster animations, clean UI
🛠️ Useful PvP Tools – keystrokes mod, custom HUD, zoom mod, toggle sprint, and more
🧠 Smart Design – lightweight, clean, and easy-to-use even on low-end PCs
🌐 Compatible with major PvP servers (like Hypixel, KitPvP, Crystal PvP)

read this:
FastPvP Modpack

This modpack is designed for PvP enthusiasts, optimizing gameplay for fast-paced action.

Credits:
This modpack includes mods from *Modrinth*. You can find the list of all mods used in this pack by visiting:
[https://modrinth.com](https://modrinth.com)
